ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "task_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task group the test belongs to */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test (e.g., Digit span forward) */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test */,
  "performance_index" TEXT /* Performance index or metric used to evaluate the test results */,
  "measured_functions" TEXT /* Functions measured by the test (e.g., short-term memory, attention) */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin or source of the test (e.g., Wechsler Memory Scale Revised) */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_task_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_group_id") REFERENCES task_groups ("task_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_groups" (
  "task_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task group */,
  "task_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the task group (e.g., Digit spans) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the task group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the task group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was administered */,
  "performance_value" REAL /* Value of the performance index for the test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the test result */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the test result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "derived_scores" (
  "derived_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each derived score */,
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result from which the score is derived */,
  "score_name" TEXT /* Name of the derived score (e.g., Digits difference score) */,
  "score_value" REAL /* Value of the derived score */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the derived score */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the derived score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the derived score was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the derived score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("derived_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_derived_scores_test_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., clinician, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_versions" (
  "test_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test version */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_versions_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_result_versions" (
  "test_result_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result version */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the test result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test result version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test result version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test result version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_result_versions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "derived_score_versions" (
  "derived_score_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each derived score version */,
  "derived_score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the derived score */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the derived score */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the derived score version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the derived score version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the derived score version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("derived_score_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_derived_score_versions_derived_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("derived_score_id") REFERENCES derived_scores ("derived_score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_metrics" (
  "test_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test metric */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_metrics_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)
